rule_metadata.name: angler_ek_checkpoint
rule_metadata.description: Angler EK Exploit Kit - Checkpoint Detection

rules.rule_text:
rule angler_ek_checkpoint
{
	meta:
		description = "Angler EK Exploit Kit - Checkpoint Detection"

	strings:
		$a = "Jul 2039" nocase
		$b = "Jul 2040" nocase

	condition:
		any of them
}
